sql.if: AND (R.RVW_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR P.PLC_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.RVW_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID JOIN PLACE P ON R.RVW_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO
R.RVW_USE_YN = 'N' 1=1 R.RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_USE_YN = #{useYn}, RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo}
mapper.select: SELECT RVW_PLC_NO FROM REVIEW WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW ( RVW_PLC_NO, RVW_MBR_ID, RVW_RATING, RVW_CONTENT, RVW_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{rvwPlcNo}, #{rvwMbrId}, #{rvwRating}, #{rvwContent}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_RATING = #{rvwRating}, RVW_CONTENT = #{rvwContent}, RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo} AND RVW_MBR_ID = #{rvwMbrId} AND RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'
UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_USE_YN = 'N', RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo} AND RVW_MBR_ID = #{rvwMbrId} AND RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT r.RVW_NO AS rvwNo, r.RVW_PLC_NO AS rvwPlcNo, r.RVW_MBR_ID AS rvwMbrId, r.RVW_RATING AS rvwRating, r.RVW_CONTENT AS rvwContent, r.RVW_REG_DATE AS rvwRegDate, r.RVW_UP_DATE AS rvwUpDate, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS nickname FROM REVIEW r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.RVW_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID WHERE r.RVW_PLC_NO = #{plcNo} AND r.RVW_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY r.RVW_REG_DATE DESC
